title: Shadow Fiend Totems
description: Always keep the Shadow Fiend hero handy!
body:
# Shadow Fiend - Totems
Transform your **immortal totem** into a hero of **Dota 2** - **Shadow Fiend**

![View Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebafef7cdd813f2541e845b318d5ac64d67864be_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Русское описание</summary>

- 💥 В этом наборе ресурсов стандартный **тотем бессмертия** заменяется на одного из героев из игры **Дота 2** - гуля **Shadow Fiend**, этот персонаж будет вам напоминать о игре и вы будете чувствовать себя **гулём!**
</details>

<details>
<summary>English description</summary>

- 💥 In this resource pack, the standard totem of immortality is replaced with one of the heroes from **Dota 2** – the **Shadow Fiend**. This character will remind you **of the game**, and you'll feel **like a ghoul!**
</details>

## Others project

- [Totem Meme Cat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-cat-meme) meme cat resource set
- [3D Sun & Moons - Reborn Cat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-sun-moons-reborn-cat) 3d sun and Moons Reborn!
- [Bunker Game Cards](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bunker-freedom) happy game cards bunker
- [Mafia Game Cards](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mafia-freedom) happy game cards mafia
